title: Case study: PCA & autoencoder on high-dimensional data
key_concepts: Compare applying linear compression (PCA) vs. learned compression (Autoencoder) on a high-dimensional dataset.
Discuss how each handles variance and reconstruction error.
Point the reader to the chapter's notebook for the full code implementation.
examples: Describe the process: Fitting PCA to retain 95% variance vs. training an autoencoder with an equivalent bottleneck size, then evaluating downstream accuracy on a simple classifier.
figures: [GAMBAR 8.1] Judul: Perbandingan Ruang Laten PCA vs. Autoencoder. Tipe: plot data. Tampilkan: Scatter plot 2D dari komponen/dimensi utama PCA bersanding dengan dimensi laten Autoencoder, memperlihatkan perbedaan pemisahan kelas. Sumber data: notebook bab 8.
code_placeholders: [KODE: Pipeline scikit-learn yang menggabungkan StandardScaler, PCA, dan model klasifikasi; sumber: notebook bab 8]
